rationale: No events with direct impact on Portugal this cycle; Iran deal uncertainty continues as the main indirect factor via EU energy prices.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Ongoing Iran deal uncertainty keeps global oil supply unclear, with indirect effects on Portuguese energy bills and cost of living.

top_events.title: Why is the price of gold trending down?
top_events.summary: Declining gold prices signal shifting global risk appetite; minor relevance to Portuguese savings and financial markets.

top_events.title: Weather tracker: heat, humidity and thunderstorms a danger at World Cup
top_events.summary: Extreme weather patterns noted at the World Cup; marginal relevance to Portugal's own summer heat and wildfire season risk awareness.
